overallAssessment: The agent successfully covered all accepted personas and domains. All personas initiated at least one journey, and all domains were utilized in at least one journey. All steps correctly resolve to known personas, System, or implied system components. The agent correctly identified and cited the available V&V requirement on all relevant user-facing journeys, while correctly leaving compliance regimes, retention rules, and integrations empty due to the lack of explicit IDs in the input material. The structure and adherence to the JSON contract are clean.
